rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious Cobalt Strike DNS Beaconing - Sysmon

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Cobalt Strike DNS Beaconing - Sysmon
id: f356a9c4-effd-4608-bbf8-408afd5cd006
related:
- id: 0d18728b-f5bf-4381-9dcf-915539fff6c2
  type: similar
status: test
description: Detects a program that invoked suspicious DNS queries known from Cobalt
  Strike beacons
references:
- https://www.icebrg.io/blog/footprints-of-fin7-tracking-actor-patterns
- https://www.sekoia.io/en/hunting-and-detecting-cobalt-strike/
author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
date: 2021-11-09
modified: 2023-01-16
tags:
- attack.command-and-control
- attack.t1071.004
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: dns_query
detection:
  selection1:
    QueryName|startswith:
    - aaa.stage.
    - post.1
  selection2:
    QueryName|contains: .stage.123456.
  condition: 1 of selection*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: critical
